subject: [PATCHv7 09/18] mm/hugetlb: Defer vmemmap population for bootmem hugepages

2026-02-27.patch_summary: This patch series aims to improve the handling of huge pages in the Linux kernel by deferring vmemmap population for bootmem-allocated gigantic pages until zones are initialized. This change allows for removal of complex logic required to rollback HVO mappings and makes zone information available from within vmemmap_populate_hvo().
